hindi: जय रामदेव बाबा राजस्थान। पोकरण के लोक देवता महान॥
english: Victory to Baba Ramdev of Rajasthan; the great folk deity of Pokhran
roman: Jai Ramdev Baba Rajasthan, Pokaran Ke Lok Devata Mahan

hindi: कृष्ण के अवतार रामदेव। सामाजिक समता के देव॥
english: Ramdev, avatar of Krishna; deity of social equality
roman: Krishna Ke Avtar Ramdev, Samajik Samata Ke Dev

hindi: ऊँट-घोड़े पर यात्रा करते। भक्त दूर-दूर से दर्शन करते॥
english: He traveled on camels and horses; devotees take darshan from far and wide
roman: Unt Ghode Par Yatra Karte, Bhakt Door Door Se Darshan Karte

hindi: पंच रंगी ध्वजा लहराती। रामदेव की महिमा गाती॥
english: The five-colored flag waves; singing the glory of Ramdev
roman: Panch Rangi Dhwaja Lahrati, Ramdev Ki Mahima Gati

hindi: हिंदू मुस्लिम सब पूजे। जात-पात से परे वे सूझे॥
english: Hindus and Muslims all worship him; he is beyond caste and creed
roman: Hindu Muslim Sab Pooje, Jaat Paat Se Pare Ve Sooje

hindi: रामदेव चालीसा जो पढ़े। जीवन में सुख-शांति सदा बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Ramdev Chalisa; happiness and peace always grow in life
roman: Ramdev Chalisa Jo Padhe, Jeevan Mein Sukh Shanti Sada Badhe

hindi: जय जय बाबा रामदेव। लोक देवों के महादेव॥
english: Victory to Baba Ramdev; the great lord among folk deities
roman: Jai Jai Baba Ramdev, Lok Devon Ke Mahadev
